# [PUB-02] Workshop paper on the γ compute / mesh substrate

> Plan ID `PUB-02` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

🟡 **Target.** A workshop paper on the 8×4 γ-surface (32-PE ternary
mesh + 10 CLARA gaps + D2D routing) is on the publication track. **No
venue, deadline, or acceptance is asserted by this repo.**

## Plan

1. Draft a workshop-length write-up that cites only repo-internal
   artefacts (RTL paths, testbench results, CLARA gap mapping,
   pre-silicon estimates explicitly labelled as such).
2. Use the GF16 vs bfloat16 NMSE result *if* SN-03 has landed a
   measurement file by submission time; otherwise omit the
   numeric-comparison claim.
3. Submit to a workshop chosen at submission time; do not pre-commit
   a venue in the repo.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Draft committed under `docs/papers/` (off-tree review may also
      be acceptable; this issue tracks the in-repo source).
- [ ] Every numeric claim in the draft traces to a checked-in
      artefact (RTL path, sim log, NMSE JSON, etc.).
- [ ] Submission record (venue + date) appended **only after**
      submission.

## R5 honesty

- **No venue or deadline is named here.** Naming one in the repo
  would imply a commitment that has not been made.
- **No paper acceptance is asserted by closing this issue** — only
  that a submission record exists.
- The "workshop paper" framing is deliberate: post-silicon results
  belong in [`PUB-03`](13_PUB-03.md), not here.
